calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2004 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joe Vicstein.
Ramiro Castro, Esq. for Petitioner: Romelia De Leon, present as Guardian at litem for: Danny De Leon and Eric De Leon, the minor Claimants, and with Spanish Interpreter: Arthur Rugama.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn.
On the basis of evidence received, Each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $231.25
Costs $75.00
A net balance of $693.75 to be depositted into a blocked account with Bank of America, 23rd and Mission St., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders for Deposit to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
